narrative:
Precinct St Clairsville 4-A (precinct in Belmont County) has 484 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
